summary: Frontend-only smoke + regression testing of Digital Shield Expo/React Native app via mobile web preview (390x844). Verified all 8 user-provided acceptance criteria: lock screen → launcher navigation, launcher chrome (skins/settings/shade buttons, music widget, quick toggles, dock, fake ad banner, page indicators), notification shade open + CLEAR, skins store with 7 skins + rewarded-ad simulation unlocking a skin after 5s countdown, settings segmented controls + toggles + about section + back navigation, and AsyncStorage persistence across page reload. All targeted testIDs are present and functional. No functional bugs found. Only issues detected are cosmetic React-Native-Web deprecation warnings (textShadow*/shadow*/pointerEvents) that don't affect behavior.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated RN-Web style props 'textShadowColor/textShadowRadius/textShadowOffset' used. Console: '"textShadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "textShadow".' Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:126-128 & styles.clock:200-204

Deprecated RN-Web style props 'shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset' used in many places. Console: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Reference: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:220-222 (notifDot), /app/frontend/app/launcher.tsx:194-197 (indicator), /app/frontend/app/skins.tsx:238-248 (previewOrb), /app/frontend/src/components/NotificationShade.tsx:135-137 & 351. Suggest a Platform.select or migration to boxShadow for web.

Deprecated 'props.pointerEvents' (should be style.pointerEvents on web). Console: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: /app/frontend/app/launcher.tsx:233 (<View pointerEvents="none">) and /app/frontend/src/components/NotificationShade.tsx:302 (particle View pointerEvents="none").

action_items: OPTIONAL (cosmetic): Replace textShadow*/shadow*/pointerEvents props with the newer unified textShadow / boxShadow / style.pointerEvents to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings. Non-blocking; app works fine on native.
No functional fixes required. All user-listed acceptance criteria pass.
critical_code_review_comments: AsyncStorage.getItem/setItem calls swallow errors silently (catch(() => {})) in ThemeContext — acceptable for a UI-only app but could hide storage-quota issues on web. Non-blocking.

FlatList windowSize=3 causes music widget & quick-toggle tiles to be duplicated in the DOM across offscreen pages (music-widget-play count=2, quick-toggle-wifi count=2). This is expected virtualization behaviour; tests should use .first() when asserting uniqueness.
seed_data_creation: None. App is fully in-memory + AsyncStorage; no seeds needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This app is UI-only; no backend/APIs. Use mobile viewport 390x844 for testing. Key testIDs used: lock-unlock-btn, lock-clock, open-skins-btn, open-settings-btn, open-shade-btn, fake-ad-banner, music-widget-play, quick-toggle-wifi (may render 2x due to FlatList virtualization — use .first()), notif-clear-all, notif-shade-backdrop, active-<skin-id>, unlock-<skin-id>, apply-<skin-id>, skins-back-btn, settings-back-btn, seg-haptic-{off,light,medium,strong}, seg-particle-{low,medium,high}, seg-anim-{slow,normal,fast}, toggle-vibration, toggle-sounds, restore-purchases, btn-privacy, btn-terms. Rewarded-ad simulator on Skins uses ~5s countdown then flips to active-<skin-id>. Persistence uses AsyncStorage which maps to localStorage on web — reloads keep state; but each fresh Playwright context is isolated (localStorage not shared across mcp_browser_automation invocations).
rca_of_issue: No functional issues found. The three warnings observed are React-Native-Web 0.21 deprecations that will still work but emit console noise: (1) textShadow* -> textShadow, (2) shadow* -> boxShadow, (3) props.pointerEvents -> style.pointerEvents. All are cosmetic and non-blocking.
